'''famara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanato|cyanato]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanato|cyanato]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| famara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæmæræth|fæmæræth]] || [[word:fæmæræj|fæmæræj]] || [[word:fæmæræsh|fæmæræsh]] || [[word:fæmæræ|fæmæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:famamarath|famamarath]] || [[word:famamaraj|famamaraj]] || [[word:famamarash|famamarash]] || [[word:famamara|famamara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:famarath|famarath]] || [[word:famaraj|famaraj]] || [[word:famarash|famarash]] || [[word:famara|famara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:famafrath|famafrath]] || [[word:famafraj|famafraj]] || [[word:famafrash|famafrash]] || [[word:famafraf|famafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:famaratha|famaratha]] || [[word:famaraja|famaraja]] || [[word:famarasha|famarasha]] || [[word:famaraka|famaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:famarath|famarath]] || [[word:famaraj|famaraj]] || [[word:famarash|famarash]] || [[word:famara|famara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:famarathal|famarathal]] || [[word:famarajal|famarajal]] || [[word:famarashal|famarashal]] || [[word:famarakal|famarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:famarathatha|famarathatha]] || [[word:famarajaja|famarajaja]] || [[word:famarashasha|famarashasha]] || [[word:famaraka|famaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:famarathan|famarathan]] || [[word:famarajan|famarajan]] || [[word:famarashan|famarashan]] || [[word:famarakan|famarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:famarathaoro|famarathaoro]] || [[word:famarajaoro|famarajaoro]] || [[word:famarashaoro|famarashaoro]] || [[word:famarakaoro|famarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
